input.context: I need to explain a messy idea to my team.

ideal_output.title: Three sentence explanation
steps: Write the main point in one sentence.
End with the next step you want.
ideal_output.next_step: Draft the first sentence before the meeting.

input.context: I keep apologizing before I say what I think.

ideal_output.title: Name one preference
steps: Say it without adding an apology.
ideal_output.next_step: Use one sentence that starts with 'I prefer...'.

input.context: I have a task I keep avoiding.

ideal_output.title: Five minute start
steps: Open the task and finish one visible piece.
ideal_output.next_step: Do the first five minutes before checking messages.

input.context: I want to help someone without sounding harsh.

ideal_output.title: One observation, one next step
steps: Keep the wording about the practice.
ideal_output.next_step: Write the feedback in two short lines.

input.context: I did one useful thing but it feels too small.

ideal_output.title: Proof of follow-through
steps: Name the useful thing you did.
ideal_output.next_step: Save a note that starts with 'I followed through by...'.

input.context: I need to ask a better question.

ideal_output.title: One useful question
steps: Write the problem in plain language.
Ask what would unblock the next step.
ideal_output.next_step: Ask the shortest version of the question.

input.context: I lost my rhythm this week.

ideal_output.title: Small restart
ideal_output.next_step: Choose a two minute restart action.

input.context: I want to speak in a calmer way.

ideal_output.title: Slow first sentence
ideal_output.next_step: Practice the first sentence out loud once.

input.context: I want to be useful in a group thread.

ideal_output.title: Add one useful context note
steps: End with a question or next step.
ideal_output.next_step: Draft one helpful sentence before replying.

ideal_output.title: Decision in two lines
steps: Name the reason that matters most.
ideal_output.next_step: Write the decision as two lines.
